home_h3_6:
Proces provides comprehensive professional services and advanced solutions 
nationwide: cleaning and staffing services, management, housekeeping, and maintenance
home_p_22: We provide comprehensive management and maintenance solutions for the commercial and residential sectors, backed by advanced technical capabilities and professional teams.
home_p_23: Supply of general and professional manpower for various roles in the business sector, on a daily or permanent basis, with full adaptation to client needs.
home_p_24: Daily cleaning services for offices, commercial buildings, and residential towers, maintaining high standards of cleanliness and hygiene over time.
home_p_25: Thorough cleaning after construction or renovation, scrubbing, polishing and coating surfaces, stain and graffiti removal, and carpet and upholstery cleaning using advanced methods.
home_p_26: Professional high-rise work for window and facade cleaning using reverse osmosis methods, rappelling, lifting platforms, and drone with aerial water cannon.
home_p_27: Comprehensive management and maintenance services for commercial buildings, offices, residential towers, hospitality, and parking lots, providing complete solutions for all ongoing operational needs.
home_p_28: Specialized cleaning and maintenance services for parking lots, courtyards, factories, and laboratories, including ozone gas disinfection and ecological pest control solutions.
home_p_30: Dedicated professional divisions for difficult access, facade treatment, nano coating, stain and graffiti removal, ecological pest control, ozone disinfection, laboratory and clean room cleaning. We combine manpower with advanced technical expertise to provide comprehensive solutions for all your organization's maintenance and cleaning requirements.
home_p_31: Rappelling, lifting platforms, lifts, scaffolding, and drone with water cannon – we reach every point.
home_p_32: Window cleaning with reverse osmosis, dirt-repelling nano coating, and graffiti removal with sand or glass blasting.
home_p_33: Laboratory, clean room, and factory disinfection with ozone gas, alongside thorough cleaning after construction or renovation.
home_p_34: Proces provides a complete service envelope for building management and maintenance, with precise adaptation to client needs. We combine professional manpower with advanced technological capabilities, providing continuous and reliable service to regular clients alongside dedicated and rapid response for one-time projects.
home_p_35: We operate dedicated departments for routine work and special projects, so each project receives the required attention and expertise. Our field teams undergo rigorous training and are equipped with the best technology, from reverse osmosis systems to specialized drones for facade cleaning.
home_p_36: Whether it's an annual maintenance contract for an office building or a one-time thorough cleaning after renovation, we adapt our methodology and team to ensure perfect results.
home_p_38: Routine cleaning, maintenance, and high-rise work teams deployed nationwide
home_p_40: Special operations department for rapid intervention, leaks, graffiti, and exceptional events
home_p_42: Annual contracts, one-time projects, or call arrangements – the work model is customized for you
home_p_43: Proces's expert team is ready to build a personalized service plan for you – from routine cleaning to advanced high-rise work with drones. Leave your details and we'll return with a professional proposal within 24 hours.
home_p_44: Proces provides professional, reliable, and personally tailored facility management and staffing solutions for businesses and commercial properties. Our expertise ensures smooth and efficient operation.
new_p_146: Providing comprehensive operational support with skilled, professional, and insured teams for all types of tasks — from routine cleaning to complex high-altitude work

about_us_p_16: Proces — Leaders in cleaning, security and facility management
about_us_p_17: Proces, part of the Maagaley Enosh Group, was founded in 2024 and operates under licenses from the Ministry of Interior and the Ministry of Justice. The company holds a manpower contractor license from the Ministry of Commerce and Industry, as well as all legally required licenses to operate a security company. Proces is an approved supplier of the Ministry of Defense and holds the ISO-9001 quality standard certification. The company employs thousands of workers.
about_us_p_18: Service begins with proper planning, precise response to each client's needs, defining work procedures and culminating in reliable and quality execution in the field, according to standards. Supervision and quality control are performed closely and regularly at all hours of day and night. As part of our strict quality control, we send all our security personnel to periodic professional training. We maintain high standards of quality, professionalism, reliability and response speed, backed by ISO 9001 quality standards.
about_us_p_19: "Cleaning Network" is a division of Security Network company from the Human Resources Group. "Cleaning Network" provides all professional services and solutions in the field of cleaning and maintenance for private entities, public institutions and government facilities. The work methods, control and supervision procedures and management quality of Cleaning Network ensure immediate, efficient and quality response to every inquiry.
about_us_p_20: Dedicated service manager for each client responsible for work quality. Supervision by area managers — employee services, quality controls, work programs and procedures. Training, courses and periodic refreshers.
about_us_p_21: Manager availability at all hours of the day. Vehicle fleet numbering over 150 vehicles and patrol and supervision units. 2 control centers operating 24 hours a day.
about_us_p_22: Thinking outside the box, innovation and progress. Development of unique means adapted to customer needs.
about_us_p_23: Precise response and personal customization for each client. We learn the unique needs and adapt the perfect solution.
about_us_p_24: 40 years of combined experience. Financial stability that ensures stability and peace of mind for our clients.
about_us_p_25: The group's management structure allows pricing flexibility — full value for your money without compromising on quality.
about_us_p_26: Proces provides professional, reliable, and customized facility management and staffing solutions for businesses and commercial properties. Our expertise ensures smooth and efficient operations.

cleaning_services_p_29: Complete operational service array under one roof – from workforce to advanced cleaning technologies
cleaning_services_p_30: General and professional teams tailored to client needs – from cleaning staff to certified maintenance managers
cleaning_services_p_31: Comprehensive cleaning maintenance for offices, commercial buildings and residential towers with personal customization
cleaning_services_p_32: Thorough cleaning before occupancy – removal of construction dust, material residues and surface polishing for complete preparation
cleaning_services_p_33: Advanced methods for high-altitude window cleaning – rappelling (rope access), lifting platforms, lifts and scaffolding
cleaning_services_p_34: Thorough treatment of windows and storefronts with reverse osmosis technology and nano coating that repels dust and dirt
cleaning_services_p_35: Polish, wax, crystal for all surface types – natural and synthetic – to achieve a brilliant appearance and long-lasting durability
cleaning_services_p_36: Deep washing and disinfection of carpets, upholstery and fabric surfaces using advanced extraction and foaming methods
cleaning_services_p_37: Sand/glass blasting for removal of graffiti, paint stains, rust and deposits from all surface types
cleaning_services_p_38: Periodic replacement of curtains, blinds and rugs alongside advanced fragrance systems for a perfect space experience
cleaning_services_p_39: From area assessment to ongoing quality control – four simple steps that guarantee perfect results
cleaning_services_p_40: The project manager arrives on site, maps the unique needs of the facility, and matches the professional team or technical unit required – whether it's routine cleaning, complex height work or comprehensive management and maintenance services.
cleaning_services_p_41: We equip our teams with the most innovative equipment – from drones with water cannons to reverse osmosis systems – to ensure that every task, even at great heights or in challenging conditions, is performed safely and with maximum efficiency.
cleaning_services_p_42: Work is performed under close supervision of experienced site managers, using advanced monitoring technologies. We handle all surface types, remove stubborn stains, and perform complex height work while adhering to strict schedules.
cleaning_services_p_43: After completion of work, rigorous quality control is performed. For contract clients we provide periodic reports and ongoing service array including surprise visits, satisfaction surveys, and dynamic team adjustment to the changing needs of the facility.
cleaning_services_p_44:
Proces operates dedicated professional departments for complex work, using the most innovative technologies in the market. 
          From rope access work (rappelling), through reverse osmosis window cleaning and nano coating, to flying a washing cannon 
          using a drone – we bring precise solutions to every maintenance challenge.
cleaning_services_p_45: Proces's certified rappelling teams perform cleaning, maintenance and sealing work at great heights while adhering to the strictest safety standards. An efficient and economical solution for high-rise buildings.
cleaning_services_p_46: Unique service by Proces: flying a water or foam cannon using a thermal drone for washing facades, roofs and parking lots. Access to any point without need for scaffolding, with maximum speed and precision.
cleaning_services_p_47: Our specialization department performs cleaning and disinfection of laboratories, clean rooms and factories using ozone gas (O3) technology and green ecological pest control, meeting the strictest international standards.
cleaning_services_p_48: We understand that facility management requires absolute reliability, advanced equipment and skilled teams. Therefore we operate at the highest standards in the industry, with emphasis on safety, professionalism and precise adaptation to your needs – whether it's a small office, residential tower or complex industrial facility.
cleaning_services_p_49: All our teams undergo rigorous safety training and work according to the strictest standards. We are equipped with full protection for height work, ecological materials, and strict protocols for risk prevention.
cleaning_services_p_50: We invested in the most innovative equipment in the market: drones with water cannons, reverse osmosis systems, nano coatings and green pest control solutions. This allows us to deliver perfect results even in the most complex tasks.
cleaning_services_p_51: Whether you need regular daily service, urgent one-time project or complex maintenance work on a tight schedule – we're here. Our teams are available 24/7 and reinforced as needed.
cleaning_services_p_52: Proces provides professional, reliable and personally tailored facility management and workforce solutions for businesses and commercial properties. Our expertise ensures smooth and efficient operation.

management_staffing_h2_1: Strategic partner for managing and maintaining your properties
management_staffing_h2_2: Management and maintenance solutions tailored to every property type
management_staffing_h2_3: Staffing solutions tailored to every operational need
management_staffing_h2_5: Ready to upgrade your facility management?
management_staffing_h3_6: Building management and manpower supply – under one roof
management_staffing_p_29: Proces provides a comprehensive solution for commercial property managers, offices, residential towers, hotels and parking facilities – combining end-to-end facility management with general and professional staffing services, all under one roof.
management_staffing_p_30: We understand that cleaning and maintenance are only part of the picture. The ability to provide skilled teams across various fields – from daily routine cleaning to professional personnel for height work, technical maintenance and complementary services – is what enables us to be more than a service provider, but a true partner in facility management.
management_staffing_p_31: With a dedicated professional department for complex operations, we integrate advanced technologies such as reverse osmosis window cleaning, nano coating, drones with water cannons and rappelling services – alongside thorough cleaning services, polishing, pest control and more.
management_staffing_p_32: Dedicated teams for cleaning offices, public areas, stairwells and elevators.
management_staffing_p_33: Height work, reverse osmosis window cleaning, nano coating, floor scrubbing and polishing.
management_staffing_p_34: After construction, renovation or before occupancy – including parking lots, carpets and upholstery cleaning.
management_staffing_p_35: Green solutions for pest control and disinfection of laboratories, factories and clean rooms.
management_staffing_p_36: Using drones, airborne water cannons, reverse osmosis and nano coating for maximum protection.
management_staffing_p_37: Commercial offices, residential towers, hotels, parking facilities and industrial environments — we adapt our cleaning systems, workforce and professional services to the unique needs of each facility.
management_staffing_p_38: Daily routine cleaning services, general and professional staffing supply, ongoing maintenance management, high-rise window cleaning, floor scrubbing and coating, and stubborn stain removal. We adapt our service array to office operating hours while maintaining a clean and professional work environment.
management_staffing_p_39: Common area cleaning, luxurious lobby care, external window cleaning through rappelling and reverse osmosis, nano coating for facades, curtain and pergola replacement, and staffing services for building maintenance. Full adaptation to building committee requirements and work schedules.
management_staffing_p_40: Comprehensive cleaning services for guest rooms, public areas, restaurants and lobbies. Carpet and upholstery cleaning, facility perfuming, ecological pest control, window and showcase cleaning using reverse osmosis method, and professional staffing supply for housekeeping and maintenance departments. Meeting the high standards of the hospitality industry.
management_staffing_p_41: Thorough cleaning of underground and above-ground parking facilities, high-pressure floor washing, oil stain and graffiti removal, concrete surface scrubbing and coating, entrance area cleaning, and waste disposal. Ongoing maintenance services adapted to traffic volume and parking facility operating hours.
